name: 免疫
subject: biology
domain_name: AS · 运输与免疫 / AS · Transport & Immunity / AS · Transport & Immunity
curriculum_points:
1 describe the structure of a DNA molecule as a double helix, including:
• the importance of complementary base pairing between
the 5′ to 3′ strand and the 3′ to 5′ strand (antiparallel
strands)
• differences in hydrogen bonding between C–G and A–T
base pairs
• linking of nucleotides by phosphodiester bonds

2 state that the bases adenine and guanine are purines
with a double ring structure, and that the bases cytosine,
thymine and uracil are pyrimidines with a single ring structure
(structural formulae for bases are not expected)

1 describe the structure of nucleotides, including the
phosphorylated nucleotide ATP (structural formulae are not
expected)

excerpts.text:
1 describe the structure of a DNA molecule as a double helix, including:
• the importance of complementary base pairing between
the 5′ to 3′ strand and the 3′ to 5′ strand (antiparallel
strands)
• differences in hydrogen bonding between C–G and A–T
base pairs
• linking of nucleotides by phosphodiester bonds

2 state that the bases adenine and guanine are purines
with a double ring structure, and that the bases cytosine,
thymine and uracil are pyrimidines with a single ring structure
(structural formulae for bases are not expected)

1 describe the structure of nucleotides, including the
phosphorylated nucleotide ATP (structural formulae are not
expected)

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「免疫」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1 describe the structure of a DNA molecule as a double helix, including:
• the importance of complementary base pairing …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：2 state that the bases adenine and guanine are purines
with a double ring struct… 对理解「免疫」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
